case_title: ELLEN AMBROFF et al VS. AMERICAN MEDICAL SYSTEMS et al

docket_entries.description: NTC OF REMOVAL OF ACTION TO FEDERAL COURT FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN MEDICAL SYSTEMS, INC. ("AMS")
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-31-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMBROFF, ELLEN AMBROFF, TERRY SERVED APR-24-2008, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN MEDICAL SYSTEMS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN MEDICAL SYSTEMS, INC. ("AMS")
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-19-2008 CONTINUED TO OCT-31-2008 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PRODUCTS LIABILITY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMBROFF, ELLEN AMBROFF, TERRY AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN MEDICAL SYSTEMS MCKESSON CORPORATION DOES 1 THROUGH 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-19-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-23-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-04-2008
RECORD REMANDED BACK TO SUPERIOR COURT CERTIFIED COPIES OF DOCKET ENTRIES, CERTIFIED COPIES OF REMAND ORDER FILED FROM UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT NORTHERN DISTRICT OF CALIFORNIA
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MCKESSON CORPORATION
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMBROFF, ELLEN AMBROFF, TERRY SERVED APR-25-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MCKESSON CORPORATION
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT MCKESSON CORPORATION
